brief.speaker: grayson
brief.text: Final deliverable. For each borough: the count, the average age, and the oldest resident. One query. Ordered so Manhattan leads. Include the anomalous NULL bucket — investors deserve transparency.

expected.sql: SELECT borough, COUNT(*), AVG(age), MAX(age) FROM census_1890 GROUP BY borough ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

hints.text: Grayson: 'Structure's right, some column's wrong. Count, average age, max age. In that order. Ordered by count, largest first.'
Grayson: 'Six rows. Five boroughs plus the anomaly. Each row: count, avg age, max age.'

success.speaker: grayson
success.text: Beautiful. Thursday's pitch is made. The NULL row, though — one resident, age 43, alone in their own bucket. Surname Hemiunu. I have... heard this name recently. From a colleague. In very different circumstances. Take your fee, clerk. And when you see your superior, tell her we should speak.
